<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-datetimepicker/2.5.3/build/jquery.datetimepicker.full.min.js"></script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        const data = {
            format: "Y-m-d H:i",
            maxDate: 0,
            scrollInput: false,
            step: 10,
            onChangeDateTime: checkPastTime,
            onShow: checkPastTime,
        };
        const $el_dtpicker = $("[js-datetimepicker]");
        $el_dtpicker.attr("autocomplete", "off");
        $el_dtpicker.datetimepicker(data);
    });
    const checkPastTime = function (inputDateTime) {
        if (typeof inputDateTime !== "undefined" && inputDateTime !== null) {
            const current = new Date();
            if (inputDateTime.getDate() === current.getDate()) {
                this.setOptions({
                    maxTime: 0,
                });
            } else {
                this.setOptions({
                    maxTime: false,
                });
            }
        }
    };
</script>
